body_txt: You're the Only Sane Man (or Woman) at The Company and your job description reads, " Babysit everyone else, stay sane and, if you have any spare time, try to get some of your actual work done ." Or at least it might as well be. When you have this job, it doesn't matter what you're supposed to be doing; your real job is to manage insane people. For some reason, it's down to you to keep everything from going completely off the rails. And it's quite likely to drive you insane as well. See also The Reliable One and Only Sane Man . Related archetypes include the Nerd Nanny , Cloudcuckoolander's Minder , Beleaguered Assistant , Token Competent Minion , and Hyper-Competent Sidekick . When it's the boss that has to deal with everyone else's antics, see Beleaguered Boss and Surrounded by Idiots .
